verification_commands.notes: 54 tests total (45 prior + 9 new), no regression
nothing ignored; all evidence is git-visible

design_summary: Bounded planner is propose_next(), returning only the current node's declared allowed_next; advance() structurally cannot accept an undeclared target.
Checkpoint gating calls Phase0ControlPlane.load_checkpoint() directly; no parallel checkpoint system was built.
Retries are bounded per node (default 2, matching Phase 0's own MAX_RETRIES); exhaustion is the explicit terminal state failed-exhausted-retries.
resume() rolls back to the last verified node, never an in-flight unverified one.
fallback() records a pinned static path as visible state, not silent behavior.
No live /goal or /loop invocation was scripted; those are product-level session behaviors this control plane wraps rather than reimplements.
remaining_risks: The engine has not yet been driven end-to-end by a live /goal- or /loop-triggered session in this environment; the wrap relationship is a documented design intent, proven at the unit level, not via a live-session trace.
planner_tokens/planner_cost_usd in run metrics are always null; no token/cost accounting hook exists at script level.
Only two workflow definitions exist by design; add more only when a real, repeated task shape justifies it, per the roadmap's static-first guidance.
Phases 5-7 remain incomplete and are not implicitly validated by these Phase 4 changes.
next_goal: Phase 4 is complete. Do not begin Phase 5 until explicitly directed.
